title: Akuyaku Onzoushi no Kanchigai Seija Seikatsu: Nidome no Jinsei wa Yaritai Houdaishitai Dake na Noni
titleRomaji: Akuyaku Onzoushi no Kanchigai Seija Seikatsu: Nidome no Jinsei wa Yaritai Houdaishitai Dake na Noni
titleNative: 悪役御曹司の勘違い聖者生活 ～二度目の人生はやりたい放題したいだけなのに～
synonyms: The Mistaken Saintly Life of a Villainous Scion ~ I Just Want to Do Whatever I Want for the Second Time in My Life!
synopsis: Ogre Verret, the eldest son of the Verret family, a family renowned for its viciousness, is a reincarnator. He was always getting cheated in his previous life because of his kind nature, and he wants to take this opportunity to enjoy the life of a powerful villain who can do whatever he wants. He is supposed be pushing the limits of tyranny, but... "Well done! Ogre-sama!" Even though he is behaving in an "insolent manner,'' for some reason those around him seem to be taking it in stride...⁉ The misunderstood villain's life as a saint begins! (Source: Dengeki Comic Regulus, translated)

title: Isekai demo Bunan ni Ikitai Shoukougun
titleRomaji: Isekai demo Bunan ni Ikitai Shoukougun
titleNative: 異世界でも無難に生きたい症候群
synonyms: ขอให้อยู่รอดปลอดภัยในต่างโลก
It's Sudden, But I Came To Another World! But I Hope To Live Safely
synopsis: "Understanding" is "Stronger" than a Sword! There is no magic without any weapons! But! This is the story of a man who wishes to live safely! "So, I've come to a different world." That man stood alone in a mountain full of plants and creatures that he never knew nor saw before. He goes down the mountain by avoiding encounters with a big slime (and bandits), and is caught as a suspicious person in the castle he reaches. In interrogation the female knight Ilius met at the imprisoned place, when talking about the bandits seen in the mountain, Irias, who was stuck in the search for said bandits, hurriedly strikes the bandits . My wish to be a brave man, or to build a harem? "I just want to live in a safe place" - a story that such a man survives the different world with "Understanding" as a weapon!

title: Otherworldly Munchkin: Let’s Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!
titleRomaji: Isekai Munchkin: HP 1 no Mama de Saikyou Saisoku Dungeon Kouryaku
titleEnglish: Otherworldly Munchkin: Let’s Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!
titleNative: 異世界マンチキン　ーＨＰ１のままで最強最速ダンジョン攻略ー
synonyms: Isekai Man Chikin
Another World Munchkin: Conquering the Dungeon as the Strongest and the Fastest with Only 1 HP
สุดเห่ยเกิดใหม่ต่างโลก HP แค่ 1 แต่สุดแกร่งสุดเปรียวพิชิตดันเจี้ยน
synopsis: 16-year-old Yukito Kirihara lives with his 14-year-old sister Sana, who he treasures more than anyone else. But when an ogre shows up outside of his window looking for Sana (a shocking event in its own right), Yukito leaps to save her—and is killed. He's offered the promise of reincarnation by a mysterious woman, who gives him a character sheet in a mysterious book. But when Yukito sees Sana in there, too, he sets off to find her, and save them both—even if he only has 1 hp with which to do it! (Source: Kodansha USA)

synonyms: 冷淡的佐藤同學只對我撒嬌
Aren’t You Too Sweet Salt-God Sato-San?
The Salt-God Sato-san is only sweet to me!
คุณซาโต้ยอดนักเมิน เธอหวานใส่ผมแค่คนเดียว
The Cold Sato is Only Sweet to Me
synopsis: Satou-san is the unattainable flower of the class. She is always cold and curt with classmates, but only I know she's actually very cute when she smiles, even if she's not much of a photographer. Oshio-kun is friendly and lively, but only I know he works at his family's cafe after school. He does a great job with the cafe's SNS account, and his mischievous smile makes my heart skip a beat! Innocent and sweet, but sometimes frustrating, this is a 120%-pure fluffy story about two people falling in love for the first time.

title: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleRomaji: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleNative: この犬ときたら孫のことしか考えていない～犬生魔王のやり遺し～
synopsis: The "Demonic Invasion" lasted for hundreds of years, and countless heroes were cut down by the Demon Lord during their reign…! Until the hero Terios, known as The Last Hope, finally defeated the Demon Lord and brought peace to the land. But the hero Terios vanished, and the Demon Lord, thought to be dead, is miraculously reborn… as a dog!? This is the story of the last Demon Lord, now all soft and fluffy, desperately trying to live a peaceful life while protecting his granddaughter, now a fugitive targeted by all of creation. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Ring ni Kakero
titleRomaji: Ring ni Kakero
titleNative: リングにかけろ
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)
synonyms: Ring ni Kakero 1

title: You Shou Yan
titleRomaji: You Shou Yan
titleNative: 有兽焉
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako is a 40-year-old unemployed man who becomes engrossed in the VR RPG "Sword and Sorcery" after being laid off from his job. In the game, he goes by the name Zeros Merlin and rises to become a top-ranked player. However, he suddenly dies in the middle of a long gaming session. To his surprise, Satoshi wakes up to find himself in a massive unfamiliar forest. He soon learns from the goddess of this world, who brought him here after his death, that he has been reincarnated with all of his in-game stats intact. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

Job Changing for the Entire Population: The Jobless Me Will Terminate the Gods
Tôi – Kẻ vô chức đã diệt thần
I'm A Loser And I Killed The Gods
synopsis: Facing a calamity that left chaos and destruction in its wake, mankind's survival was hanging in the balance. The only solution? Get a job and get good! Some became mages, other summoners. However, Cloud, a promising student with a great future ahead of him refused to get a job! Being jobless is his true calling! (Source: WebComics)

title: The Otome Heroine's Fight for Survival (Manga)
titleRomaji: Otome Game no Heroine de Saikyou Survival @COMIC
titleEnglish: The Otome Heroine's Fight for Survival (Manga)
titleNative: 乙女ゲームのヒロインで最強サバイバル@COMIC
synopsis: After losing her parents at a young age to a monster attack on their village, Alicia is sent to an orphanage, where she spends three miserable years being mistreated—and doing her best to smile through it all. After finally reaching her limit and running away, Alicia is attacked by a strange woman who wants to take the young girl’s place as the protagonist of something called an otome game. During the struggle, Alicia accidentally absorbs part of the woman’s memories and knowledge, transforming her from a scared child to a calculated young woman with a mission: to write her own destiny. Now adrift in an unforgiving world, Alicia vows to grow stronger by any means necessary. She’ll need all the might she can muster if she has any hope of changing her fate and fighting for survival. (Source: J-Novel Club)

Hatsumi, a third-year substitute on the baseball team, flinches everytime at the slightly excessive skinship from Hinaki, a second-year regular. One day, however, Hatsumi witnesses Hinaki kissing another member of the club and begins to feel unsettled. A sensitive BL between a senior who is always an substitute and a junior who is a regular. (Source: East Press, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

synopsis: The story follows Sousaku Kamifuda, an otaku around his 30s, who is fully indulging in his trading card game hobby. In the midst of his mother selling the entirety of his precious card collection, the man is transported to another world. Using his card game skills, he attempts to find a way back home. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Over Rev!
titleRomaji: Over Rev!
titleNative: オーバーレブ!
synonyms: A Legend of Ultimate Hot Rodder
synopsis: Ryoko's life used to revolve around track but due to an injury she can no longer follow the path she hoped to. One day while out with her friends, she witnesses two cars racing and gets caught up in the excitement, especially after realizing the one driver is a young woman like herself! When a chance arrives for her to try drifting, she dives right in, even though she's never driven a car before. Suddenly, she has a new passion... and a lot to learn. (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

Princess Fiera, who lost her homeland and family before her very eyes, rises up to slay her sworn enemy, the calamity known as the "dragon," while bearing her brother's will and the unvoiced grief of the people on her still young shoulders!

title: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleNative: 私を好きすぎる勇者様を利用して、今世こそ長生きするつもりだったのに（多分、また失敗した）
synonyms: I’m Using the Hero Who Loves Me Too Much, Because I Planned to Live a Long Life in This World (I Probably Failed Again)
synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

title: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleRomaji: Koishita Hito wa, Imouto no Kawari ni Shindekure to Itta.: Imouto to Kekkon Shita Kataomoi Aite ga Naze Imasara Watashi no Moto ni? to Omottara @COMIC
titleEnglish: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleNative: 恋した人は、妹の代わりに死んでくれと言った。―妹と結婚した片思い相手がなぜ今さら私のもとに？と思ったら―@COMIC
synopsis: Wisteria, the daughter of a count, secretly has feelings for Bright, a beautiful childhood friend and son of a duke who, unable to use magic, had been conducting forbidden research in the shadows. Devastated when Bright confesses his love for her younger sister, Wisteria is even more hurt when he asks her to take her sister's place as a sacrifice. Is her love for Bright so strong that she will give up her life for him? (Source: TOKYOPOP)
